---
title: "Reading Materials Sources"
subtitle: "Valuable e-resources and open access scholarly materials for Geography students."
author: "Geography Team"
---

Welcome to our curated collection of reading materials. These sources provide high-quality textbooks, research papers, and interactive learning modules from leading academic networks.

---

### E-learning Portals

To support your self-study and provide access to authoritative resources, we recommend the following platforms:

::: {.subject-grid}

::: {.subject-card}
<i class="bi bi-book-half" style="font-size: 2rem; color: var(--primary-blue); margin-bottom: 10px;"></i>
#### [e-Adhyayan (e-Books)](https://ebooks.inflibnet.ac.in/eadhyayan/site/genre?id=Geography)
High-quality e-Books for postgraduate Geography courses provided by INFLIBNET.
:::

::: {.subject-card}
<i class="bi bi-mortarboard" style="font-size: 2rem; color: var(--primary-green); margin-bottom: 10px;"></i>
#### [e-PG Pathshala](https://epgp.inflibnet.ac.in/Home/ViewSubject?catid=KwH6LnSyFhsLI6M9Z0+tvw==)
Comprehensive curriculum-based interactive content and video lectures.
:::

::: {.subject-card}
<i class="bi bi-person-video3" style="font-size: 2rem; color: #ff5722; margin-bottom: 10px;"></i>
#### [NPTEL Courses](https://nptel.ac.in/courses)
Online courses in Geography and related disciplines provided by India's top technical institutes.
:::

:::

---

### How to use these materials
- **e-Adhyayan**: Best for looking up standard university textbook material.
- **e-PG Pathshala**: Provides modular self-paced learning content and video explanations.
- **NPTEL Courses**: Excellent for in-depth academic lectures and structured certifications from premier institutions.
